* Experience with infrastructure\\-as\\-code tools such as Terraform
* Knowledge of monitoring and logging tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and Datadog

**Why Join Williams\\-Sonoma**
* Work on scalable backend systems and APIs
* Opportunity to build high\\-performance and reliable applications
* Be part of a collaborative and technology\\-driven environment
* Contribute to innovation in e\\-commerce and supply chain systems


**About Us**

 Founded in 1956, Williams\\-Sonoma Inc. is the premier specialty retailer of high\\-quality products for the kitchen and home in the United States. title: Senior Software Engineer - UI/UX Team (Hybrid Work Schedule)
description:
**Senior Software Engineer – UI/UX Team**
**Location: Pune, India**
**Model of Work: Hybrid**
**About Quorum Software**
 Quorum Software connects people and information across the energy value chain. Twenty years ago, we built the first software for gas plant accountants. Pipeline operators came next, followed by land administrators, pumpers, and planners. Since 1998, Quorum has helped thousands of energy workers with business workflows that optimize profitability and growth. Our vision for the future connects the global energy ecosystem through cloud\\-first software, data standards, and integration. The trusted source of decision\\-ready data for 1,800\\+ companies, Quorum Software makes the essential connections that let us work better together in the connected energy workplace. For more information, visit quorumsoftware.com
   

  

**Be a part of our legacy**
 Quorum Software is the world's largest provider of digital technology focused solely on business workflows that empower the next evolution of energy. From emerging companies to supermajors, throughout every region of the globe, customers rely on Quorum's proven innovation and unmatched global expertise to streamline business operations and make data\\-driven decisions that optimize profitability and growth. Our industry\\-leading solutions are transforming energy companies across the entire value chain, helping visionary leaders evolve their organizations into modern energy companies.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 Are you excited by challenges? Do you enjoy working in a fast\\-paced, international and dynamic environment? Then now is the time to join Quorum Software, a rapidly growing company and industry leader in oil \\& gas transformation.
   

  

**Job Purpose**
 You will join Quorum's UI/UX team as a senior design practitioner, driving the user experience vision across Quorum's NA O\\&T platform. This role goes beyond execution — you will be a design advocate who deeply understands user problems, simplifies complex enterprise workflows, and helps shape better product solutions in close partnership with product management and engineering. You will own end\\-to\\-end UX work including research, interaction design, and high\\-fidelity prototyping, while helping to define what great design looks like at Quorum. As we invest in building significant new capabilities across the platform, you will help establish and scale our in\\-house design practice.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Own the end\\-to\\-end UX process for complex enterprise workflows: discovery, user research, journey mapping, wireframing, prototyping, usability testing, and design iteration — with a consistent focus on solving real user problems and simplifying complex workflows, not just delivering design artifacts
* Apply systems thinking to understand the full landscape of user journeys across Quorum's platform, ensuring that new workflows are designed with the broader product ecosystem in mind — promoting consistency and coherence with existing experiences rather than designing in isolation
* Create high\\-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes using tools such as Figma, and maintain a scalable design system that ensures visual and interaction consistency across the platform
* Partner with product management to translate business requirements and user needs into clear, well\\-documented design specifications and interaction patterns
* Conduct and synthesize user research — including interviews, surveys, heuristic evaluations, and analytics review — to inform design decisions with evidence rather than assumptions
* Communicate design decisions clearly and compellingly: articulate the rationale behind design choices, present work to diverse audiences, and build alignment across product managers, engineers, and business stakeholders who may come with different perspectives and priorities
* Collaborate with engineering teams to ensure designs are feasible, well\\-understood, and faithfully implemented, participating in design reviews and providing redlines and asset handoffs
* Leverage AI\\-assisted design tools and workflows (e.g., AI\\-powered prototyping, content generation, and layout exploration) to accelerate iteration and expand the range of design options explored
* Mentor junior designers and contribute to building a design\\-first culture, including establishing UX review processes, design critiques, and documentation standards
* Actively drive innovation by recommending improvements to design processes, tooling, and practices that raise the quality bar and increase team efficiency
* Collaborate across time zones and geographies with distributed product and engineering teams
* And other duties as assigned


**What To Bring**
* 6–8 years of professional UX/UI design experience, with a strong portfolio demonstrating end\\-to\\-end design work on complex, data\\-rich enterprise or B2B applications
* Expert proficiency in Figma or equivalent modern design and prototyping tools, including component libraries, auto\\-layout, design tokens, and interactive prototyping
* Deep understanding of UX research methodologies and the ability to plan and execute research that drives meaningful product improvements
* Experience building and maintaining enterprise\\-scale design systems with documented patterns, guidelines, and reusable components
* Strong information architecture and interaction design skills, particularly for workflow\\-heavy applications with complex data models
* Excellent visual design sensibility — typography, layout, color, spacing — applied within the constraints of enterprise software
* A systems thinker with the ability to understand end\\-to\\-end user journeys and design with the broader product ecosystem in mind, creating workflows that are consistent, connected, and coherent across the platform
* Exceptional communication skills — able to clearly explain and justify design decisions to both technical and non\\-technical audiences, build shared understanding, and drive alignment across diverse stakeholder groups
* Demonstrated ability to communicate design rationale through presentations, documentation, and storytelling
* Comfort working in agile environments, managing multiple concurrent workstreams, and adapting designs based on engineering feasibility and business priority
* Familiarity with front\\-end technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) sufficient to collaborate effectively with engineers and understand implementation tradeoffs — implementation skill is a plus but not the focus of this role
* Bachelor's degree in Design, Human\\-Computer Interaction, Information Science, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience


**Nice To Have**
* Experience with AI\\-assisted design workflows, including tools that leverage generative AI for layout exploration, content drafting, image generation, or rapid prototyping
* Background in energy, industrial, or other operationally complex B2B domains
* Experience with Azure DevOps or similar platforms for managing design work alongside engineering workflows
* Knowledge of accessibility auditing tools and processes
* Experience conducting or facilitating design sprints
* Familiarity with data visualization design for dashboards, reporting, or analytics interfaces


**Additional Details**
* Visa Sponsorship: Employment eligibility to work with Quorum Software in India is required as the company will not pursue visa sponsorship for this position.


**Quorum Diversity Statement:** 
 At Quorum, we are committed to fostering, cultivating, and preserving a culture of belonging. We want to be the place where a diverse pool of talented people join us, stay with us and do their best work. With a diverse team of employees, we grow and learn better together. The collective sum of the individual differences, life experiences, knowledge, innovation, self\\-expression, and talent that our employees invest in their work represents not only part of our culture, but our reputation and our achievements. We are fully focused on equity and equality and believe deeply in diversity of race, gender, sexual orientation, age, religion, ethnicity, national origin, ability, neurodiversity and all the other characteristics that make us unique.
   

  

*Quorum Business Solutions and Quorum Software are Equal Opportunity Employers. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, veteran status, disability, genetic information, or any other basis protected by law.*
**Those applicants requiring reasonable accommodation to the application and/or interview process should notify a member of the Human Resources Department**
**Recruitment Scam Alert:** 
 Quorum Software does not charge fees, request payments, conduct interviews via messaging apps, or request the installation of software at any stage of the recruitment process. All legitimate recruitment activities are conducted exclusively through our official careers website (www.quorumsoftware.com/careers) and email addresses ending in
 **@quorumsoftware.com** 
 . Any communication that does not originate from these official channels should be considered unauthorized and may be reported to \\[email protected]

title: Engineer, Geotechnical
description:
**Job Description**
 We are looking for an exceptional person to add to our Geotechnical Team in our Bengaluru / Noida, India office. You will have at least 5 to 8 years’ experience in the design of foundations, slope stability, embedded retaining walls, settlement analysis for various infrastructure projects, especially metro projects.
   

  

 The successful candidate will play a key role in the day\\-to\\-day delivery of projects working closely with and being supported by other team members, Project Managers and Directors within the UK team.
   

  

 As a specialist/expert within the UK\\&IE based Geotech Team working predominantly on a range of variety of geotechnical projects across the UK world.
   

  

 At WSP, you’ll find yourself challenged in fascinating and far\\-reaching ways. You’ll explore new and inspiring opportunities to make the most of your expertise, broaden your professional horizons and create exciting new possibilities for people, organisations and society in general.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Development of professionally and technically competent reports by making use of efficient working practices to provide industry leading, best value services to our clients.
* Provide support in all aspects of project delivery including financial analysis, client liaison, public and statutory body consultation, quality control, management of specialists, contractors and sub consultants.
* Coordinate and manage multidisciplinary teams working on geotechnical projects, work closely with and provide professional advice that builds relationships and raises the profile of the geotechnical division
* Effectively manage and deliver project work with robust project financial management. Has budget responsibility for the delivery of projects and services.
* Provide support in all aspects of project delivery meeting high technical standards, required quality and within allotted budget.
* Working in accordance with accepted methods and legislation (including CDM) and operate in accordance with WSP’s corporate health \\& safety, environment, and quality (SHEQ) standards. Taking ownership for aspects of SHEQ management across the geotechnical team.
* Undertake own continuing professional development and showing management of others across a team, to maintain and build professional capability.


 Key Competencies
   

  

 Mandatory Skills
   

  

* A sound understanding of geotechnical engineering, with a broad understanding of the underlying principles, and substantial project management experience of medium sized projects.
* Will have proven previous metro projects experience including undertaking under ground elements design, ground movement assessment, embedded retaining systems design, Diaphragm wall designs etc
* Will have proven previous experience of undertaking: geotechnical desk studies; critical checking of Ground Investigation Factual Reports; preparing Ground Investigation Reports in accordance with the requirements of Eurocode 7 : Part 1\\.
* Will have contributed to the production of some Geotechnical Design Reports.
* Demonstrable experience of geotechnical design together with a familiarity of design submission documentation. This includes a demonstrable understanding of the underlying principles and a knowledge of Eurocode 7 and UK annex design codes, ground investigation and construction contracts and specifications.
* Ability to use a range of geotechnical software for the design of civil engineering projects including the following: deep and shallow foundations (including pile group analysis); embedded and gravity retaining walls; earthworks/slope stability; reinforced earthworks.
* Proficiency with the use of geotechnical software for the management, review and presentation of ground investigation and geotechnical data using current best practice. Must have the skills to check, critically evaluate and amend your own work, be it drawings, calculations or reports.
* General commercial awareness and an understanding of client requirements as described in contracts, including an understanding and awareness of contractual issues and risks when dealing with clients and sub\\-consultants.
* Provides active contribution to technical excellence and innovation across the local geotechnical team
* Excellent report\\-writing and strong client liaison skills. Will have significant previous experience of undertaking and managing: geotechnical desk studies; designing, procuring \\& supervising Ground Investigations (GIs); checking and reviewing Ground Investigation Reports \\& Geotechnical Design Reports in accordance with the requirements of Eurocode 7 : Part 1\\. Client facing and able to lead at client/contractor meetings.
* Good oral communication skills also, able to provide solid support at client facing meetings and able to assist with client/contractor meetings.


**Desired Skills**
* Hands on experience in using the geotechnical software like XDISP, GEOSTUDIO, Repute 2\\.5, WALLAP, Settle 3D, Slide 2, Plaxis 2D and Plaxis 3D.
* Knowledge in the Engineering Geology or equivalent demonstrable experience.
* Chartered Engineer from a reputed professional body membership (preferably ICE, UK) or working towards chartered engineer.


**Qualifications**
* Master’s degree in civil engineering with Geotechnical Engineering / Soil Mechanics and Foundation engineering as specialisation.
* Working towards full professional membership / chartership.


 BGV:
   

  

* Employment with WSP India is subject to the successful completion of a background verification (“BGV”) check conducted by a third\\-party agency appointed by WSP India.
* Candidates are advised to ensure that all information provided during the recruitment process — including documents uploaded — is accurate and complete, both to WSP India and its BGV partner”.


**About Us**
 WSP is one of the world's leading professional services consulting firms. We are dedicated to our local communities and propelled by international brainpower. We are technical experts and strategic advisors including engineers, technicians, scientists, architects, planners, surveyors and environmental specialists, as well as other design, program and construction management professionals. We design lasting solutions in the Transportation \\& Infrastructure, Property \\& Buildings, Earth \\& Environment, Power \\& Energy, Resources and Industry sectors, as well as offering strategic advisory services. Our talented people around the globe engineer projects that will help societies grow for lifetimes to come.
   

  

 With approximately
 **4,000 talented people** 
 across 3 locations (Noida, Bengaluru \\& Mumbai offices) in India and more than
 **73,000 globally** 
 , in 550
 **offices across 40 countries** 
 , we engineer projects that will help societies grow for lifetimes to come.
   

  

 At “WSP” we draw on the diverse skills and capabilities of our employees globally to compete for the most exciting and complex projects across the world and bring the same level of expertise to our local communities. We are proud to be an international collective of innovative thinkers who work on the most complex problems. Uniﬁed under one strong brand, we use our local expertise, international reach and global scale to prepare our cities and environments for the future, connect communities and help societies thrive in built and natural ecosystems. True to our guiding principles, our business is built on four cornerstones:
 **Our People, Our Clients, Our Operational Excellence and Our Expertise.**
**www.wsp.com**
**We are**
* Passionate people doing purposeful and sustainable work that helps shape our communities and the future.
* A collaborative team that thrives on challenges and unconventional thinking.
* A network of experts channeling our curiosity into creating solutions for complex issues.


***Inspired by diversity, driven by inclusion, we work with passion and purpose.***
**Working with Us**
 At WSP, you can access our global scale, contribute to landmark projects and connect with the brightest minds in your field to do the best work of your life. You can embrace your curiosity in a culture that celebrates new ideas and diverse perspectives. You can experience a world of opportunity and the chance to shape a career as unique as you.
   

  

**Our Hybrid Working Module**
 With us, you can operate in a flexible, agile, yet structured work environment and follow a Hybrid Work Model.
   

  

* Maximize collaboration.
* Maintain product quality and cultural integrity.
* Balance community, collaboration, opportunity, productivity, and efficiency.


**Health, Safety and Wellbeing**
 Our people are our greatest asset, and we prioritize a safe work environment. Health, safety, and wellbeing are integral to our culture, with each of us accountable for fostering a safe workplace through our “Making Health and Safety Personal” initiative. Our Zero Harm Vision drives us to reduce risks through innovative solutions, earning recognition for our global health and safety practices with the prestigious RoSPA Health and Safety Awards for six consecutive years.
   

  

**Inclusivity and Diversity**
 WSP India is dedicated to fostering a sustainable and inclusive work environment where our greatest strength \\- Our People \\-feel valued, respected, and supported. We ensure an unbiased approach in hiring, promotion, and performance evaluation, regardless of age, gender identity, race, religion, sexual orientation, marital status, physical ability, education, social status, or cultural background.
   

  

**Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.**
 Join our close\\-knit community of over 73,300 talented global professionals dedicated to making a positive impact. Together, we can make a difference in communities both near and far.
   

  

**With us, you can.
   

  

 Apply today.**
**NOTICE TO THIRD PARTY AGENCIES:**
*WSP does not accept unsolicited resumes from recruiters, employment agencies, or other staffing services. Unsolicited resumes include any resume or hiring document sent to WSP in the absence of a signed Service Agreement where WSP has expressly requested recruitment/staffing services specific to the position at hand. Any unsolicited resumes, including those submitted to hiring managers or other business leaders, will become the property of WSP and WSP will have the right to hire that candidate without reservation – no fee or other compensation will be owed or paid to the recruiter, employment agency, or other staffing service.*

title: FPC Global - Senior Digital Buildings Engineer ( 10-0 yrs )
description:
**Job Description**
 At FPC Global, our people are our greatest asset. We’re a fast\\-growing, global consultancy where collaboration, innovation, and ambition come together to deliver exceptional outcomes across the full facility lifecycle.
   

  

 Founded in 2014 by our CEO, Dean Francis, we’ve grown into a team of 140\\+ professionals working across the Americas, EMEA, APAC, and our London headquarters. We partner with clients to deliver integrated, future\\-focused consultancy services—setting new benchmarks for sustainability, technology, and performance.
   

  

 We believe great ideas can come from anywhere. That’s why we foster a culture where voices are heard, initiative is encouraged, and careers are built with purpose.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Senior Digital Buildings System Engineer is responsible for managing the complete process of onboarding and integrating diverse building management systems (BMS), IoT devices, and facility management solutions into a designated cloud platform. This role is platform\\-agnostic, designed to work across various hardware and software ecosystems, ensuring seamless data integration and compatibility.
